dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8526 IH: To amend the Public Health Service Act to update quality standards for mammography facilities for the use of AI systems, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Schweikert introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to update quality standards for mammography facilities for the use of AI systems, and for other purposes.

section.header: Updating quality standards for mammography facilities for use of AI systems
section.text: Section 354(f)(1) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 263b(f)(1)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in the matter preceding clause (i), by striking physician who and inserting physician, or a machine-learning or artificial intelligence system, that; and
in clause (ii), by striking who and inserting that; and

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (G)(ii)(I), by striking signed by the interpreting physician.
